'''fodagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zingy|zingy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zingy|zingy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fodagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodagithi|fodagithi]] || [[word:fodagiji|fodagiji]] || [[word:fodagishi|fodagishi]] || [[word:fodagiki|fodagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodaguthuthu|fodaguthuthu]] || [[word:fodagujuju|fodagujuju]] || [[word:fodagushushu|fodagushushu]] || [[word:fodagukuku|fodagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodaguthu|fodaguthu]] || [[word:fodaguju|fodaguju]] || [[word:fodagushu|fodagushu]] || [[word:fodaguku|fodaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodagufthuf|fodagufthuf]] || [[word:fodagufjuf|fodagufjuf]] || [[word:fodagufshuf|fodagufshuf]] || [[word:fodagufkuf|fodagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodagethe|fodagethe]] || [[word:fodageje|fodageje]] || [[word:fodageshe|fodageshe]] || [[word:fodageke|fodageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodagothotho|fodagothotho]] || [[word:fodagojojo|fodagojojo]] || [[word:fodagoshosho|fodagoshosho]] || [[word:fodagokoko|fodagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodagotho|fodagotho]] || [[word:fodagojo|fodagojo]] || [[word:fodagosho|fodagosho]] || [[word:fodagoko|fodagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodagofthof|fodagofthof]] || [[word:fodagofjof|fodagofjof]] || [[word:fodagofshof|fodagofshof]] || [[word:fodagofkof|fodagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfthÃŸf|fodagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfjÃŸf|fodagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfshÃŸf|fodagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfkÃŸf|fodagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fodagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fodagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fodagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fodagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfthÃŸf|fodagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfjÃŸf|fodagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfshÃŸf|fodagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfkÃŸf|fodagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfthÃŸf|fodagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfjÃŸf|fodagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfshÃŸf|fodagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fodagÃŸfkÃŸf|fodagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodagÃḊthÃḊ|fodagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fodagÃḊjÃḊ|fodagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fodagÃḊshÃḊ|fodagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fodagÃḊkÃḊ|fodagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodagathatha|fodagathatha]] || [[word:fodagajaja|fodagajaja]] || [[word:fodagashasha|fodagashasha]] || [[word:fodagakaka|fodagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodagatha|fodagatha]] || [[word:fodagaja|fodagaja]] || [[word:fodagasha|fodagasha]] || [[word:fodagaka|fodagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodagafthaf|fodagafthaf]] || [[word:fodagafjaf|fodagafjaf]] || [[word:fodagafshaf|fodagafshaf]] || [[word:fodagafkaf|fodagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fodagasha|fodagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodagshÃḋsha|fodagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodagrosha|fodagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodagmusha|fodagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodagyasha|fodagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodagnkshÃḋsha|gofodagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodagnkrosha|gofodagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodagnkmusha|gofodagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodagnkyasha|gofodagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fodadagasha|fodadagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodadagshÃḋsha|fodadagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodadagrosha|fodadagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodadagmusha|fodadagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodadagyasha|fodadagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodadagnkshÃḋsha|gofodadagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodadagnkrosha|gofodadagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodadagnkmusha|gofodadagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodadagnkyasha|gofodadagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fedÃḊgasha|fedÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fedÃḊgshÃḋsha|fedÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fedÃḊgrosha|fedÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fedÃḊgmusha|fedÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fedÃḊgyasha|fedÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofedÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|gofedÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofedÃḊgnkrosha|gofedÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofedÃḊgnkmusha|gofedÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofedÃḊgnkyasha|gofedÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fodfagasha|fodfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodfagshÃḋsha|fodfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodfagrosha|fodfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodfagmusha|fodfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodfagyasha|fodfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodfagnkshÃḋsha|gofodfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodfagnkrosha|gofodfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodfagnkmusha|gofodfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodfagnkyasha|gofodfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
